title: Floral Shaggy Norwegian Yogurt Bake
description: A fluffy, fragrant yogurt bake with hints of dill and lavender, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C and melt the butter in a kadhai until foamy.
Whisk together the Greek yogurt, honey, and lemon zest in a large bowl until smooth.
Sift the whole wheat flour and baking powder into the yogurt mixture and stir until a thick batter forms.
Fold in the chopped dill, lavender flowers, and crushed walnuts, reserving a few walnut pieces for topping.
Pour the batter into a greased kadhai or shallow pan and spread it evenly with a spatula.
Bake for 20 minutes until the surface is puffed and golden brown.
Remove the pan from the oven and let the bake cool for a few minutes before sprinkling the reserved walnut pieces.
Slice the shaggy bake into wedges and serve warm, optionally drizzled with a little honey.
Enjoy this floral, aromatic Norwegian yogurt bake as a comforting weeknight dinner.
